10 minute timer
Warm Up Equipment:
PVC Pipe
Red Band
Black Band
2x 1-5kg plate
2 Rounds:
30 sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 e/s PVC Around The Worlds

2 Rounds:
8e/s Leaning Lateral Raise
10 Band Kneeling Face Pull
12 Banded Tricep Extension

strength.name: SUPERSET
strength.description:
E4MOMx4
8 DB Chest Press 22.5/15
10e/s 2 sec Paused Single Arm DB Row
Scaled 15/10
RX 22.5/15
RX+ Anything above RX (DBs out back go up to 60 kg. Try me ;P)

strength.name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
strength.description:
4x10 | 4x10e/s
2 sec pause at the top
Squeeze shoulder blades
Start the lawnmower

strength.name: Shoulder Press
strength.description:
4x8 | Strict Press
Not elbows up
Bar in palm not knuckles
Punch the ceiling (knuckles up) | E2MOMx4
0:00 8 @ 50%
2:00 8 @ 50%
4:00 8 @ 50%
6:00 8 @ 50%

strength.name: Tricep Extension
strength.description:
3x10 | On cable machine with hands at chin height
Elbows tucked to side
Extend arms completely at bottom

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
15 min AMRAP
8 Push Ups
30 Double unders
10 KB Hang Clean & Jerks (5 per side)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Prioritize antagonist and posterior chain work to balance today's pressing-heavy session and support recovery.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: SUPERSET. Strength: DB Chest Press, 4 by 8. Strength: Single Arm Dumbbell Row, 4 by 10. Strength: Shoulder Press, 4 by 8 at 50 percent. Strength: DB Chest Fly, 3 by 10. Strength: Lat Pulldown, 3 by 10. Strength: Tricep Extension, 3 by 10. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 8 Push Ups, 30 Double unders, 10 KB Hang Clean & Jerks (5 per side). For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, biceps, glutes.
